text.content:
2
*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

text.content:

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

text.content:
2
*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

text.content:

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

	parentw = parent().width

	la = ppar.Labelalign

	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :

		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

text.content:
2
*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

Bodytext.67108945: "" "'Go to https://neutone.space/plugin/, install the VST3 for your operating system.  Make the path in audiovst point to the plugin.\\n\\nand from the VST UI panel. download the demucs stem separation.\\n\\nIt only outputs stereo, so we feed it 2 monos, and bring down to mono after.\\n\\nThe expression in audiovst\\'s p1 parameter should be   parent().par.Nutonebass, etc\\n\\nMost effective is to make Drums = 1 and the rest at 0.  Listen to audiodev1 to hear what it\\'s filtering out.\\n\\nIt occasionally falls way behind so you need to make Active off then on again, or a similar action.\\n\\nThe Neutone authors should be made awre of these imperfect behaviors.'"

text.content:

*�����������������ppar = parent().par

def setupParameters(scriptOP):
	return

def cook(scop):
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height

	aspectxy = op('indicator').width / parenth
	la = ppar.Labelalign	
	
	scop.clear()

	scop.appendRow( ['path', 'parameter', 'value', 'enable'] ) 
	
	scop.appendRow( ['..', 'buttontype', 'momentary', '1'] ) 
	
	if not ipar.Binary.Flip :
		bw = parentw
		bh = parenth				
	else :
		bw = parenth
		bh = parentw	
		
	if ppar.Indicator=='icon' :
		aspectxy = op('indicator').width / op('indicator').height	
		iw = bh * aspectxy
		ih = bh
	else :
		iw = bw if ppar.Labellocate=='none' else ((bw-ppar.Labelwidth)+1)
		ih = bh
		
	lw = 0 if la=='none' else ( (bw - iw) if (la in ['left', 'right', 'center']) else bw )
				
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'w', lw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'h', bh, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'alignx', ppar.Labelalign, '1'] )
	oltx = iw/bw if ppar.Labellocate=='right' else 0
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'x', oltx * bw, '1'] )

	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'w', iw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'h', ih, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'alignx', ppar.Textalign, '1'] )

	oitx = 0
	if ppar.Labellocate=='left' :
		oitx = 1-iw/bw
	elif ppar.Labellocate=='right' :
		oitx = 0
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['indicator', 'x', oitx * bw, '1'] )
	
	fontsize = 12 if parent().par.Fontauto==True else parent().par.Fontsize
	scop.appendRow( ['label', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	scop.appendRow( ['text', 'fontsize', fontsize, '1'] )
	
	return

text.content:

*�����������������9def setupParameters(scrop):
	return

def cook(scrop):
	ppar = parent().par	
	bgrey = .17	 # background grey
	
	parentw = parent().width
	parenth = parent().height
	
	if (ppar.Horizvert == 'horizontal') or ((ppar.Horizvert == 'auto') and (parentw >= parenth)) :
		w = parentw
	else:
		w = parenth
		
	sl = ppar.Borderlow/w
	if ppar.Numfield =='edit' and op('flip').par.npasses==0 :
		sl = sl + (60+ppar.Borderhigh)/w
	sh = 1-ppar.Borderhigh/w
	
	scrop.clear()

	scrop.appendRow( [0, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] ) 

	scrop.appendRow( [sl, 0, 0, 0, 0] )

	try:
		notchlist = eval(ppar.Notches.val)

		for notch in notchlist :
			nu = sl + notch*(sh-sl)
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu-.01, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
			scrop.appendRow( [ nu+.01, 0, 0, 0, 0] )
	
	except:
		pass
	scrop.appendRow( [ sh, bgrey, bgrey, bgrey, 1] )
		
	return

2
*�����������������l# tie pars on VST CHOP to parent pars

def onOffToOn(channel, sampleIndex, val, prev):
	vstop = op('audiovst')
	
	vstop.par.vstp1.expr = "parent().par.Neutonebass"
	vstop.par.vstp2.expr = "parent().par.Neutonedrums"
	vstop.par.vstp3.expr = "parent().par.Neutonevocals"
	vstop.par.vstp4.expr = "parent().par.Neutoneother"
	vstop.par.vstbypass.expr = "not parent().par.Neutoneactive"
	return

def whileOn(channel, sampleIndex, val, prev):
	return

def onOnToOff(channel, sampleIndex, val, prev):
	return

def whileOff(channel, sampleIndex, val, prev):
	return

def onValueChange(channel, sampleIndex, val, prev):
	return
